## Problem

What problem or gap motivates this feature?

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you'd like to see. Is there a similar feature in another project you can link to?

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you've thought about.

## Additional Context

Screenshots, mockups, or examples that help clarify the request.
